name: Chronomaly Technology
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>先史遺産技術</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>オーパーツテクノロジー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 "Chronomaly" monster in your Graveyard; banish it, then look at the top 2 cards of your Deck, add 1 of them to your hand, and send the other to the Graveyard. You can only activate 1 "Chronomaly Technology" per turn. You cannot Special Summon any monsters during the turn you activate this card, except "Chronomaly" monsters.
eff: Target 1 "Chronomaly" monster in your Graveyard; banish it, then look at the top 2 cards of your Deck, add 1 of them to your hand, and send the other to the Graveyard. You can only activate 1 "Chronomaly Technology" per turn. You cannot Special Summon any monsters during the turn you activate this card, except "Chronomaly" monsters.

action: Looks at cards from the top of the player's Deck
Sends from the top of your Deck to your Graveyard
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to archetype specific monsters
